findings.description: Critic predicted 6 failure modes (approval fatigue, ensemble tax, pre-mortem dedup, formulaic lenses, rotation backfire, no off-switch) that reshaped the entire design from 13 additions to 8 with 0 new interaction points
findings.proposedRule: Always run pre-mortem before finalizing designs with user-facing mechanisms

findings.description: Original design added 9 new user interaction points (14-17 total per workflow). Revised design achieves all 8 quality gaps with 0 new interaction points by embedding into existing checkpoints
findings.proposedRule: Embed quality in existing checkpoints rather than adding new interaction points

findings.description: User chose to remove intensity toggle entirely. Rationale: escape hatches get used to avoid quality mechanisms. Self-calibration handles trivial changes (fast convergence)
findings.proposedRule: If a quality mechanism is optional, users skip it when it matters most — remove escape hatches
